methodology_description.text: Tax revenue analysis follows the standard public finance approach: revenue-to-GDP ratios enable cross-country comparison by normalizing for economic size. The World Bank's GC.TAX.TOTL.GD.ZS is the most widely used cross-country tax indicator.

methodology_summary: Standardized Tax Data: World Bank tax revenue indicators standardized with country codes and year alignment. Source: World Bank WDI. Construction: direct. Coverage: global_193, 1972-2024.
notes: Tier 2 intermediate; consumed by P40, not exported to Output/
